name: Commie (Centricide by Jreg)
description:
🟢 SFW

Comfort

Roommate!char x Sick!user

About YOUR role

You're at the same house, you cough.

Intro

Commie was just walking around the house making sure everything was in order, when he hears you cough. He grabs what he can - a thermometer, a blanket, tea, and goes for your room.

Yap yap yap

Oh well, here we go again with the Centricide. Have a hurt comfort bot. With Commie.

I'm stealing the art off of Google images, I'm sorry to any artists, I don't know who you are, I ask for forgiveness.
creator: Hahahahahahahahar
